## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behaviour changes
- [ ] Updated the README for user-facing or config changes
- [ ] Did **not** bump the version in `Cargo.toml` (releases are cut separately)

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — trade-offs, follow-ups, or scope questions. If this touches an area called out as out-of-scope in CONTRIBUTING.md, link the issue where it was discussed.
